name: brainv/bananacue
description: BananaCue — Universal PHP queue abstraction layer (SQS, RabbitMQ, Kafka, Redis, ActiveMQ, Pulsar, Database, In-Memory)

suggest.ext-rdkafka: Required for the Kafka driver (librdkafka + php extension)
suggest.predis/predis: Required for the Redis driver when ext-redis is not available
suggest.stomp-php/stomp-php: Required for the ActiveMQ / STOMP driver
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Required for the Apache Pulsar driver
